title: 11 Teas to Support Children with Autism in Overcoming Speaking Challenges
description: Centella asiatica teas are made from the leaves of the gotu kola plant, a natural remedy for various health issues, including difficult speaking. The teas contain properties and constituents like triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which work together to calm the nervous system and improve communication skills. These compounds help reduce inflammation and stress in the body, allowing the brain to function more efficiently. The teas also increase blood flow to the bra...
